findings.title: Pod Delete UI not accessible — clusters all unreachable
findings.description: The Pod Delete feature is implemented in code (backend: podsRouter.delete, frontend: DeletePodDialog component with trash button). However, the pods table section is conditionally rendered ONLY when effectiveIsLive=true. Since all 7 clusters in this deployment show 'Error / Stored Data' (unreachable), the pods section never renders. Dialog cannot be verified.
findings.workaround: Need at least one live/reachable Kubernetes cluster to verify Pod Delete UI

findings.title: Deployment Scale UI not accessible — no deployments loaded
findings.description: The Deployment Scale feature is implemented in code (backend: deployments.scale, frontend: ScaleDialog with replica input). However, deployments are fetched from live K8s clusters only. With all clusters unreachable, 0 deployments appear, so the Scale button is never rendered. Dialog cannot be verified.
findings.workaround: Need at least one live/reachable Kubernetes cluster to verify Scale UI

findings.title: Rate limiter (429) triggers aggressively under automated/rapid API access
findings.description: Multiple 429 Too Many Requests errors observed in console during testing. Triggered by rapid tRPC calls (presence.heartbeat, clusters.list, metrics.currentStats). Under normal single-user operation, this should not occur. Rate limit threshold may be too low for automated QA.

findings.title: RBAC Permissions page functional
findings.description: Permissions page (/permissions) loads with Resource Access Viewer and Permission Matrix. ClusterRole access control is visible with team/user assignments. Platform Team=owner, SRE Team=admin on production-eks confirmed.
